messages.text: Hello Henrik, traditional recruiting tools rely on keyword matching, meaning you see the same candidates as everyone else. Our platform takes a different approach — analyzing merit signals across education, career trajectory, and achievements to surface genuinely high-potential talent. We've been working with European scale-ups and typically see a 40% reduction in time-to-hire alongside significantly higher candidate quality. I'd love to schedule a call to discuss Klarna's hiring challenges and demonstrate our platform. What does your calendar look like this week?
Hi Thomas, thanks but we're set with our current tools. Maybe revisit in Q3?
Hey Katarina, your team at Spotify is expanding. We specialize in finding hidden talent traditional search misses. Open to a brief call?
Hi Katarina, following up one last time. Would a quick async demo video be more convenient?
Hey Matthias, Maria Gonzalez connected us. Great things about Adyen's hiring ambitions. Free for a quick call?
Interesting, Laura. Heard good things about Nova. Let me loop in my team and find a time.
Isabelle, quick note — we help companies like Bolt source high-potential candidates using merit-based intelligence. Interested?
Thanks Marco, this is timely. Let's book 30 min next week.
Perfect, sent a calendar invite for Thursday. Looking forward to it!
Hi team, we've been struggling with candidate quality from traditional tools. Came across Nova and the AI search looks promising. Can we do a demo?
Hi Joris, thanks for your interest! Would love to set up a demo. How does this week look?

Hello Camille, traditional recruiting tools rely on keyword matching, meaning you see the same candidates as everyone else. Our platform takes a different approach — analyzing merit signals across education, career trajectory, and achievements to surface genuinely high-potential talent. We've been working with European scale-ups and typically see a 40% reduction in time-to-hire alongside significantly higher candidate quality. I'd love to schedule a call to discuss N26's hiring challenges and demonstrate our platform. What does your calendar look like this week?
Hey Camille, wanted to circle back — any interest in learning more about how we could help N26?
Hi team, we've been struggling with candidate quality from traditional tools. Came across Nova and the AI search looks promising. Can we do a demo?
Hi Nils, thanks for your interest! Would love to set up a demo. How does this week look?
Elisa, quick note — we help companies like Wise source high-potential candidates using merit-based intelligence. Interested?
Marco, sounds great. We've been looking for something like this. Free Wednesday afternoon?

Hi Pieter, I hope you're doing well. I've been following Delivery Hero's growth and I'm impressed by what your team has achieved. At Nova, we've built an AI-powered recruiting tool that searches over 650 million profiles using merit-based intelligence — not just keywords. We evaluate education, employer quality, achievements, and career milestones to surface high-potential candidates others miss. I think this could be really valuable for Delivery Hero given the roles you're hiring for. Would you have 20-30 minutes this week to discuss how we could help accelerate your pipeline?
Thanks Marco, this is timely. Let's book 30 min next week.
Hi Marta, following up on my previous message. Would love to find time to connect this week.
